description: Building practical understanding of microcontrollers, embedded C/C++, sensors, and hardware debugging through hands-on training and experiments.
Working with Arduino and ESP8266-based setups to strengthen core concepts in device control and hardware-software interaction.
Exploring communication workflows and low-level troubleshooting with a focus on reliable system behavior.

experiences.role: Full Stack Developer, S3 Library Platform
description: Designed and built a library management SaaS platform focused on subscriptions, seat allocation, admin workflows, and multi-location operations.
Handled backend architecture, frontend flows, deployment, and product iteration as an end-to-end independent build.
Used direct exposure to library operations to refine features based on practical workflows rather than assumptions.
Paused the product after active validation, carrying forward lessons in product scope, adoption, and execution discipline.
Built and maintained backend services for SaaS applications using Node.js and Express.
Designed REST APIs for inventory, subscription, billing, and operational workflows.
Integrated payment systems including Stripe and Razorpay with secure webhook handling.
Contributed to backend improvements around performance, schema structure, and workflow automation while working with cross-functional teams.
Started my professional backend journey by supporting API development, testing, debugging, and data operations.
Worked with MongoDB, Postman, and Node.js-based services while learning team workflows and production expectations.
Built the discipline of translating requirements into structured backend tasks with guidance from senior developers.
